mnemonics: GENESIS Means Genesis: The Genesis Block is the very first block in a blockchain, just like the book of Genesis is the first book in the Bible.
keyPoints: The genesis block is the first block ever created in a blockchain.
It is hardcoded into the software of the cryptocurrency's application.
It serves as the foundation of the entire blockchain, with all subsequent blocks linking back to it.
commonMistakes: Believing the genesis block contains a reference to a previous block hash (it is set to zero).
Thinking the genesis block was mined for a reward (the 50 BTC reward is not spendable).
